items.final_wording: Supports periodic medication review, accurate medication lists, adherence, continued indication, interaction, monitoring, reconciliation, and nephrotoxic-medicine context without treatment changes or doses.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Polypharmacy and drug stewardship
exact_location.locator: Practice Point 4.3.1 and Figure 46; summary PDF pages 50 and 135–137

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports periodic medication review, accurate medication lists, adherence, continued indication, interaction, monitoring, reconciliation, and nephrotoxic-medicine context without treatment changes or doses.

items.rationale: Supports CKD drug stewardship and review of potentially harmful medicines for NSAID kidney-risk documentation; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.

source.title: Medicines optimisation: the safe and effective use of medicines to enable the best possible outcomes — Recommendations
source.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE medicines, prescribing, pharmacy, discharge, and information-governance adaptation
source.population: Adults, children, and young people using medicines, with specific transfer, reconciliation, and decision-involvement recommendations.
source.setting: Transfers between care settings and clinician-led medicines consultations.
source.exclusions: Exact for documenting current medicines, changes made during transfer, reconciliation, discrepancies, person or carer involvement, values, preferences, and clinician-led decisions. It does not generate a medicine start, stop, dose, prescription, or deprescribing decision.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports structured review of all medicines, views, understanding, concerns, questions, adherence context, adverse-reaction or side-effect context, monitoring, and circumstances for seeking professional advice.

items.rationale: Supports structured clinician-led medicine review for NSAID kidney-risk documentation; no decision is generated.
